name: Low Fat Chicken Stuffed Shells
recipeIngredient: 2 cans reduced-fat cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the chicken in salt and pepper until cooked through.
2. Allow the chicken to cool, then cut into bite-sized pieces.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the chicken, sour cream, soup, and seasonings. Stir well.
4. Place approximately 1 tablespoon of the mixture in each cooked and cooled pasta shell.
5. Sprinkle about 1 teaspoon of bread crumbs on top of each shell.
6. Drizzle the shells with melted margarine.
7. Place the shells in a casserole dish, sprayed lightly with non-stick cooking spray.
8. Bake covered at 350°F for 25 minutes.
Yields 24 servings.
[per Serving Calories 85 Fat 2 grams]
